sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51977" key="kainopaqe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καινο-πᾰθέω</orth>, <sense id="n51977.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">suffer things unheard of</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1106a</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
